title: Potvrdi Zavrsetak

challengeFiles.name: script

solutions.name: script

tests.text: confirmEnding("Walking on water and developing software from a specification are easy if both are frozen", "specification") treba da vrati false.
confirmEnding("He has to give me a new name", "name") treba da vrati true.
tests.testString: assert.isTrue(confirmEnding('He has to give me a new name', 'name'));

tests.text: confirmEnding("If you want to save our world, you must hurry. We dont know how much longer we can withstand the nothing", "mountain") treba da vrati false.
Vas kod ne treba da koristi ugradjeni .endsWith() metod za resavanje ovog izazova.

description:
Proverite da li string (prvi argument, str) zavrsava zadatim ciljnim stringom (drugi argument, target).

Ovaj izazov moze da se resi metodom .endsWith(), uvedenom u ES2015. Ali za potrebe ovog izazova, potrebno je da umesto toga koristite neki od JavaScript substring metoda.
